summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of College ERP system with backend API testing and frontend UI automation. Major functionalities working well with 87.2% backend success rate and ~95% frontend success rate.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 520 Internal Server Error when submitting document requests
critical_bugs.impact: Students cannot submit document requests (bonafide, TC, etc.)

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 520 Internal Server Error when submitting grievances
critical_bugs.impact: Students cannot submit grievances through the portal

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 422 validation error - expects fee_structure_id in query params instead of request body

security_issues.issue: Students can access admin-only endpoints and view all student data
security_issues.impact: CRITICAL: Role-based access control bypass - privacy violation

integration_issues.issue: Backend 520 error prevents form submission completion
Backend 520 error prevents form submission completion

passed_tests: Landing page loads with all 5 role cards
Authentication for all roles (Principal, Admin, HOD, Faculty, Student)
Student dashboard with CGPA, attendance, announcements display
Principal dashboard with institution metrics and analytics charts
Fee management with payment order creation

action_item_for_main_agent.critical_security_fix: Fix role-based access control - students should not access /api/students endpoint (all student data exposed)
backend_fixes: Fix 520 errors in document request submission (/api/documents/request)
Fix fee payment API validation - fee_structure_id parameter handling
action_item_for_main_agent.testing_recommendation: After fixes, re-run backend_test.py to verify issues resolved
